rulings.Case Title: RICARDO BROWN VS. TAMAR BROWN et al

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, August 29, 2016, Line 1. OTHER MICHAEL KASOLAS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property is GRANTED, subject to overbid. Hearing Required to address exemption from San Francisco Housing Code. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FIRST AMERICAN TRUST, FSB, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE THEA VS. JAMES S ARIAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Judgment And Recall The Writ Of Execution
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, August 29, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANT JAMES ARIAS Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Judgment And Recall The Writ Of Execution is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b). Additionally, upon consideration of Defendant's proposed opposition, the motion for entry of judgment would be granted. =(501/REQ)
